$comment: - raw/notes/ is the user's own notes: never edit (only the user writes here).
- raw/{articles,assets,repos}/ is external material; agent may read, not edit.
- wiki/ is agent-owned and freely writable (canonical + analyses).
- PostToolUse hook runs rumdl --fix on any edited markdown so lint
drift never accumulates silently between operations.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.md$' | xargs -r -I{} rumdl check --fix {} >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
